gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, alumni volunteers also share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and alumni volunteers also share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
